## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR change and why? -->

## Linked issue

<!-- Link the issue this closes, e.g. `Closes #123`. If there's no issue, explain why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New tool / feature
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation only

## How was this tested?

<!-- Be specific. Don't say "tests pass" — say WHICH tests and what they cover. -->

- [ ] `npm test` (966 tests)
- [ ] `npm run check:claims` (catches tool/test drift)
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run check:secrets`
- [ ] Manual smoke: I called the affected tool with **\_\_\_\_** and observed **\_\_\_\_**

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated (if behavior changed or counts/numbers changed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md entry under "Unreleased"
- [ ] New tool: entry added to docs/openapi.json via `npm run docs:openapi`
- [ ] New tool: entry added to Available Tools table in README

## Backwards compatibility

<!-- Does this change input/output shape of an existing tool? If so, call it out and note any callers that need updates. -->
